title: Pedestals - Core
description: A Minecraft Paper plugin designed for server administrators who want to add interactive crafting and display elements to their world.
body:
# Pedestals

Pedestals is a powerful and customizable Minecraft Paper plugin designed for server administrators who want to add interactive crafting and display elements to their world. It allows for the creation of unique pedestal systems that can be used for advanced item processing, decorative displays, or progression-based mechanics.

## Features

- Custom Pedestals: Create and manage multiple pedestal types with specific properties.
- Interactive GUI: Intuitive menu-driven system for managing pedestal settings and configurations.
- Flexible Recipes: Define custom recipes that interact with pedestals for unique crafting experiences.
- MiniMessage Support: Full support for modern Minecraft text formatting throughout the plugin messages.
- Permission System: Granular control over who can create and edit pedestals.
- Global Announcements: Optional broadcast messages when crafting tasks reach completion.

## Commands

- /pedestal create: Create a new pedestal at your current location.
- /pedestal edit: Open the management GUI for a specific pedestal.
- /pedestal list: View all active pedestals.
- /pedestal move: Relocate an existing pedestal.
- /pedestal toggle: Enable or disable a pedestal.
- /pedestal delete: Remove a pedestal from the world.

## Permissions

- pedestals.admin: Grants access to all administrative commands and the management GUI. Default: OP.

## Installation

1. Download the latest Pedestals JAR file.
2. Place the JAR in your server's 'plugins' folder.
3. Restart your server to generate the configuration files.
4. Configure 'config.yml' to your liking and start creating pedestals!

## Links

- Discord: https://discord.gg/zwj5sEbmDs
